nodes.name: advanced-elicitation.md
nodes.summary: Provides structured elicitation techniques (9 selectable methods) to deepen and refine agent-generated content during document creation or general chat sessions.

nodes.name: apply-qa-fixes.md
nodes.summary: Guides the developer agent through systematically applying QA-identified fixes to a story implementation, ensuring all reported issues are resolved before re-validation.

nodes.name: brownfield-create-epic.md
nodes.summary: Creates a focused epic for small brownfield enhancements (1-3 stories) that don't require full PRD or architecture documentation, targeting low-risk isolated feature additions.

nodes.name: brownfield-create-story.md
nodes.summary: Creates a single implementation-ready story for a minimal brownfield change, analyzing the existing codebase to produce a self-contained story with full technical context.

nodes.name: correct-course.md
nodes.summary: Diagnoses a derailed or stalled implementation, identifies the root cause, and produces a corrective action plan to get development back on track.

nodes.name: create-brownfield-story.md
nodes.summary: Alternative entry point for authoring a brownfield story, emphasizing existing system integration analysis and safe implementation patterns for an existing codebase.

nodes.name: create-deep-research-prompt.md
nodes.summary: Generates a structured deep-research prompt for an external AI research tool, capturing the project context and specific questions needed to inform planning or architecture decisions.

nodes.name: create-doc.md
nodes.summary: Drives interactive creation of any BMad-templated document by walking the agent through each template section with user elicitation and structured output.

nodes.name: create-next-story.md
nodes.summary: Identifies the next logical story from the epic backlog and produces a comprehensive, implementation-ready story file enriched with technical context, acceptance criteria, and dev notes.

nodes.name: document-project.md
nodes.summary: Produces or updates project-level documentation by scanning the codebase and existing docs, synthesizing architecture, API, and onboarding information into a cohesive doc set.

nodes.name: execute-checklist.md
nodes.summary: Runs a named BMad checklist item by item, marking each complete and halting on failures, providing a reusable gate-check mechanism across any workflow phase.

nodes.name: facilitate-brainstorming-session.md
nodes.summary: Guides the analyst agent through a structured brainstorming session with the user, capturing and organizing ideas into a brainstorming output document for later use in planning.

nodes.name: generate-ai-frontend-prompt.md
nodes.summary: Converts a completed front-end spec into a ready-to-paste prompt for AI UI generation tools (v0, Lovable, etc.), enabling rapid scaffolding of the UI layer.

nodes.name: index-docs.md
nodes.summary: Scans the project docs folder and generates or updates an index file listing all BMad documents with titles, purposes, and inter-document relationships.

nodes.name: kb-mode-interaction.md
nodes.summary: Defines how agents interact with the BMad knowledge base in KB mode, routing questions to the appropriate doc sections and surfacing relevant guidance without full doc reads.

nodes.name: nfr-assess.md
nodes.summary: Assesses non-functional requirements (performance, security, scalability, reliability) for a story or epic and appends NFR acceptance criteria and constraints to the relevant document.

nodes.name: qa-gate.md
nodes.summary: Performs a structured QA review of a completed story implementation, verifying all acceptance criteria are met, tests pass, and code quality standards are satisfied before marking the story done.

nodes.name: review-story.md
nodes.summary: Conducts a peer review of a story file before implementation begins, checking completeness, clarity, testability of acceptance criteria, and alignment with the parent epic.

nodes.name: risk-profile.md
nodes.summary: Generates a risk profile for a project, epic, or story by identifying technical, schedule, and integration risks along with mitigation strategies.

nodes.name: shard-doc.md
nodes.summary: Splits a monolithic BMad document (PRD, architecture) into separate sharded files per epic or section, enabling agents to load only relevant context slices.
